dispatch.audit.reactiveInterventionBlock: Reactive orchestration audit found intervention issues; auto delivery blocked
dispatch.audit.report.action1: 1. Add follow-up fix tasks for intervention items (recommend serialization and supplement contracts.freeze_files / depends_on)
dispatch.audit.report.action2: 2. Re-run before entering Phase C summary
dispatch.audit.report.resultBlocked: Result: intervention issues detected, automatic delivery blocked.
dispatch.batch.resetCancelReason: Starting a new execution cycle; clearing leftover tasks from previous cycle
dispatch.delegation.executionRequirement:
## Execution Requirements
Finish analysis and solution judgment first, then implement and verify; do not mechanically copy scripts.
dispatch.errors.acceptanceConstraintsCon: acceptance / constraints / context must be arrays with at least one non-empty string
dispatch.errors.currentSessionMissingCan: Current session context is missing; cannot create Todo
dispatch.errors.dispatchCategoryMissing: dispatchTaskCategories missing taskId={taskId}; dispatch registration data is inconsistent
dispatch.errors.categoryOwnershipMismatc: Category {category} is inconsistent with the current task's ownership semantics (task domains: {taskDomains}; user goal domains: {promptDomains}). Split or rewrite the Assignment according to the user goal before dispatching again
dispatch.errors.categoryOwnershipSplitRe: Category {category} currently spans multiple ownership domains {domains}. Split it into multiple ownership-specific Assignments before dispatching
dispatch.errors.integrationPhaseRequired: An integration Assignment must not absorb frontend/backend feature work before a real phase handoff when no depends_on is provided. Dispatch frontend/backend ownership tasks first, then use integration for hookup, alignment, or final validation after they finish. If this is an existing-system integration issue, make the existing dependencies or already-built capabilities explicit in the task
dispatch.errors.integrationPhaseMustRunL: An integration Assignment must not be registered in the same active batch as frontend/backend feature tasks. Finish the current ownership phase first, then dispatch integration in a later round against real completed predecessor tasks
dispatch.errors.ownershipSplitRequired: Category {category} is only a fallback category, but the task matches multiple ownership domains {domains}. Split it into multiple Assignments and choose a more specific category for each one before dispatching again
dispatch.errors.readOnlyPromptRejectsMod: The current user request is explicitly read-only/planning-only; dispatching a modifying task with requires_modification=true is not allowed
dispatch.errors.workerWaitWithoutActiveB: There is no active Assignment batch to wait for. Call worker_dispatch successfully first, then call worker_wait.
dispatch.errors.workerWaitUnknownTasks: worker_wait task_ids are not part of the current active batch: {taskIds}
dispatch.errors.splitTodoOwnershipViolat: The current Assignment ownership is {assignmentCategory}, but todo_split subtasks {subtaskIndexes} clearly fall into the {conflictingDomain} domain. todo_split may only refine the current Assignment and must not re-split work into another ownership domain
dispatch.errors.writeTaskRequiresGitWork: Write tasks require a Git workspace (isolated worktree). Current workspace is not a Git repository: {workspaceRoot}
dispatch.errors.sessionNotFoundForTodos: No queryable session found; pass mission_id or session_id explicitly
dispatch.errors.splitDepthExceeded: Maximum split depth reached (3 levels), cannot split further
dispatch.errors.splitTodoMissingSessionC: todo_split missing current session context; cannot create subtasks
dispatch.errors.taskNameOrGoalRequired: task_name or goal must provide at least one non-empty string
dispatch.errors.todoManagerNotInitialize: TodoManager is not initialized, cannot get Todos
TodoManager is not initialized, cannot update Todo
dispatch.errors.updateTodoCannotResetPen: Todo {todoId} current status={currentStatus}, cannot reset to pending
Todo {todoId} current status=running, requires force_reset to reset to pending
dispatch.errors.updateTodoCannotSetSkipp: Todo {todoId} current status={currentStatus}, cannot update to skipped
dispatch.errors.updateTodoInvalidStatus: Todo {todoId} status={status} is invalid, only pending/skipped are supported
dispatch.errors.workerMissingMissionCont: Worker lacks valid mission context; cannot query Todos
dispatch.lane.description: Note: this queue is a real-time snapshot. Later tasks for the same Worker will be merged into this card.
dispatch.notify.runtimeExecutionFailover: Task {taskId} detected that {fromWorker} became temporarily unavailable during execution ({reason}); automatically downgraded to {toWorker} to continue
dispatch.notify.dependsOnDroppedCrossSes: Task {taskId} has {count} depends_on entries from another session; ignored ({dependencies})
dispatch.notify.dependsOnDroppedUnfinish: Task {taskId} has {count} historical depends_on entries not completed; ignored and continued ({dependencies})
dispatch.notify.dependsOnDroppedUnknown: Task {taskId} has {count} unresolved depends_on entries; ignored and continued ({dependencies})
dispatch.notify.dependsOnResolvedHistory: Task {taskId} has {count} historical depends_on entries already completed; treated as satisfied ({dependencies})
dispatch.notify.nonGitWriteSerialized: Git isolation is unavailable in the current workspace; write tasks have been downgraded to single-write serial mode
dispatch.notify.nonGitWriteSerializedRea: non-Git workspace; downgraded to single-write serial mode
dispatch.notify.nonGitWriteSerializedTas: Task {taskId} detected no Git isolation in the current workspace; automatically added {count} write-task dependencies and downgraded to serial execution
dispatch.notify.parallelScopeHintMissing: Task {taskId} is missing scope_hint; automatically added {count} dependencies and downgraded to serial execution
dispatch.notify.ownershipCategoryWarning: Task {taskId} has category {category} that conflicts with ownership signals: {details}
dispatch.notify.ownershipFallbackSingleD: Fallback category {fromCategory} was automatically rewritten to {toCategory} based on the clear ownership domain {domains}
dispatch.notify.ownershipInferredSingleD: Category {fromCategory} was normalized to ownership route {toCategory} based on the clear domain signal {domains}
dispatch.notify.ownershipFallbackSingleD: fallback category {category} overrides a clear domain signal {domains}
The task clearly matches domain {domains}; prefer that specific category instead of {category}
dispatch.notify.ownershipFallbackMultiDo: fallback category {category} is carrying a multi-domain task {domains}
The task matches multiple ownership domains {domains}; split it into multiple Assignments before dispatching instead of using {category} directly
dispatch.notify.routingAdjusted: Task rerouted: requested category {category}, actual worker {selectedWorker} ({routingReason})
dispatch.phaseBPlus.blockingDecisionFail: Failed to decide on blocking issue, degraded to continue: {error}
dispatch.phaseBPlus.blockingNoDecision: Blocking issue did not receive a valid decision, degraded to continue: {question}
dispatch.phaseBPlus.prompt:
Worker {workerId} encountered an issue during execution and needs a decision:

## Worker Report
{question}

## Current Batch Status
{batchStatus}

## Original User Requirement
{userPrompt}

Please decide:
1. If you can provide clear instructions to continue, provide them
2. If additional workers are needed, call worker_dispatch
3. If user intervention is required, explain it

stream.recovery.continuationPrompt:
[System] The previous output was interrupted during transmission (network fluctuation). Auto-recovery ({attempt}/{max}). Here is the last fragment before interruption:
"{tail}"
Please continue immediately after the fragment above without repeating any existing content.
stream.recovery.continuationPromptNoTail: [System] The previous output was interrupted during transmission (network fluctuation). Auto-recovery ({attempt}/{max}). Please continue from where the output left off without repeating.
stream.recovery.toolCallWithText: [System] The previous round was interrupted during tool call phase (network fluctuation). Auto-recovery ({attempt}/{max}). Please continue from existing output; if tools are needed, re-emit the complete tool_call with full arguments. Do not repeat prior text.
stream.recovery.toolCallOnly: [System] The previous round was interrupted during tool call phase (network fluctuation). Auto-recovery ({attempt}/{max}). Please continue the current task; if tools are still needed, re-emit the complete tool_call with full arguments.
